schemas.required_dry_run_evidence: Local request packet preview and validator notes
schemas.required_rollback_policy: Stop if the packet needs execution or backend mutation.
schemas.purpose: Normalize operator request packets without enabling execution.
schemas.safety_notes: Copy/paste only. No storage, no queue, no live action.
schemas.future_backend_dependency: Future request store and approval service
schemas.future_dependencies: Future auth, storage, approval, and audit persistence

schemas.required_dry_run_evidence: Reviewer notes and local decision summary
schemas.required_rollback_policy: Stop if the decision becomes a live approval.
schemas.safety_notes: Decision is informational only until future systems exist.
schemas.future_backend_dependency: Future review ledger and approval storage
schemas.future_dependencies: Future auth, audit storage, and approval persistence

schemas.required_dry_run_evidence: Local ledger preview and validator output
schemas.required_rollback_policy: Stop if the ledger path requires live storage.

schemas.future_backend_dependency: Future ledger store and audit persistence
schemas.future_dependencies: Future auth, storage, approval, and audit services

schemas.future_backend_dependency: Future handoff storage and review persistence
schemas.future_dependencies: Future auth, storage, approval, and audit services

scorecard.reason: Each readiness contract includes source phase, safety boundary, and future dependency notes.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Keep the future dependency notes aligned with the live roadmap.

scorecard.reason: All required schema families are represented in the static contract pack.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Do not introduce live schemas until the backend exists.

scorecard.reason: The build explicitly declares no live automation, no execution, and no mutation.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Preserve the no-go assertions in every future phase.

scorecard.reason: Phase 5 through Original +1B validators and the master wall are already in place.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Extend the validator wall only with safety-preserving compatibility edits.

scorecard.reason: Original +1B is production verified and the live site remains read-only.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Re-run production verification after any dashboard banner or copy change.

scorecard.reason: Missing auth, storage, queue, audit, approval, and write boundaries are explicit.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Map future backend work to the exact gap list before any execution phase.

scorecard.reason: Rollback and no-go rules stay visible and copyable.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Keep blocked conditions visible until the real control plane exists.

scorecard.reason: Real automation is intentionally blocked because the future control-plane dependencies are missing.
scorecard.recommended_improvement: Treat this build as readiness review only.

no_go_decisions.reason: No persistent audit log exists yet.
no_go_decisions.operator_recommendation: Keep audit as a local note only.

no_go_decisions.reason: No approval record store exists yet.
No live rollback system exists yet.
Mutation would bypass the human gate.
no_go_decisions.operator_recommendation: Do not enable mutation in the client build.

no_go_decisions.reason: This build is client-side and copy-only.
